message:
bd-hak3: close unit tests bead (180 TUI tests, 2.6x target)

Verified 180 unit tests across all 8 TUI component areas:
widgets(96) app(34) layout(16) events(16) theme(14) msg(4).
Tests added by prior commits (a2e7fbf, f72f785) already cover
all acceptance criteria; closing the tracking bead.
